header.title: Paris, Eiffelturm, Teleskop -- 2014 -- 1272.jpg
header.description: Telescope on the observation deck of the Eiffel Tower, Paris, FranceThe Eiffel Tower is the most famous landmark in Paris. It was built for the 1889 World’s Fair to mark the 100th anniversary of the French Revolution. The 324-meter-high tower was designed by engineer Gustave Eiffel and his team.Construction began in 1887 and took just over two years. At the time of its completion, the Eiffel Tower was the tallest structure in the world. Initially, the iron structure was criticized by many artist
header.author: Dietmar Rabich

header.title: Tour Eiffel - 20150801 13h56 (10614).jpg
header.description: Floors of the Eiffel Tower view from the square, in Paris.
header.author:
